description_long: This is a sleek, teal-colored sports car with a low, aerodynamic profile and a distinctive set of custom graphics, including a pixelated bear on the hood and a stylized bird on the side. The car features a smooth, contoured body with pronounced wheel arches and a gently sloping roofline. The windows are tinted black, and the car has a set of white, multi-spoke wheels that add to its sporty appearance. The front grille is wide and aggressive, with detailed headlights integrated into the design. The roof displays a colorful, pixelated window pattern, and the rear includes realistic taillights and a license plate. The overall design suggests a high-performance vehicle intended for urban or suburban environments.
description: A teal sports car with custom pixel art graphics, white multi-spoke wheels, and a sleek, aerodynamic body. Features include tinted windows, a wide front grille, and detailed headlights and taillights.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the pixelated bear graphic on the hood, the wide front grille, and the white multi-spoke wheels.
description_view_1: Rear-left view highlighting the pixelated window pattern on the roof, the rear taillights, and the stylized bird graphic on the side.
description_view_2: Rear-right view focusing on the sloping roofline, rear taillights, and the continuation of the bird graphic along the side.
description_view_3: Front-right view displaying the bear graphic on the hood, the front grille, and the transition of the side graphics toward the rear.
